search_query: how to fasten deck stair treads
combined_text: Stair Tread Nosing Stair Tread Nosing When building your stairs it usually works well to use two deck boards to build the stair tread. The tread is the part of the stair that you walk on and is held in place by fasteners mounted to the horizontal surface of the stair stringers. When installing the tread many builders
